transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang, I prepared something you guys are very familiar with
I've done something like this before already
I was craving some beef intestines
I will be eating this at home today
It was about 8kg before it was cooked And now it's down to 4kg
I was told this is about 25 servings
The weight cuts almost in half because of the grease
Bon appetit!
It's been sitting here for a bit, but it's still tasty
Can you guys see the filling?
It's completely filled
It's so good
You definitely need makjang sauce when eating intestines (Soybean Seasoning Sauce) so I looked it up online
It said to put cider inside Ssamjang paste to make it
It did get a little watery

I guess I can use this dip
A long one
It's hot!
It's too hot when eating as a whole
It's really delicious
Can you see the filling? (fat)
This cider ssamjang dip
It's okay
This is makchang (upper lining of the last stomach)
This one is very chewy
I'm going to eat a warm one
It's so tasty
Super chewy
Amazing
Large intestines
This is crispy

It got a little cold
Or is it because it was sitting in grease?
Yeah, it's too greasy
Pickled wild leek
It goes so well together
I have Green Onion Kimchi here too
Let's get them together
Makchang is so yummy
The makjang sauce I made is pretty legit
It's not exact, but it's similar
I wish I had some chives
Spiced chives
Pickled wild leek
The large intestine is too greasy
I'm warming them up with the grill
The chives, green onion kimchi, and the pickled leek are all similar and delicious

Yum
Let's eat the ones on the bottom
They're not burnt
Hot!
I really wish I had some spiced chives
Makchang is delicious too
If I cut it,
You can see the inside It's filled
It's oozing out
Yum
They are all filled
The large intestine is a bit hard for me to eat right now
They are so good and crispy when it's freshly cooked at the restaurant
But it's way too greasy right now
I should've ordered a little less
The small intestines go really well with the green onion kimchi

I'm already almost finished?
Stacked
The kimchi is spicy!
I fill have like this much grease built up in my body
I never get sick of eating the small intestines It's too good
I'm almost done with them already
It's been 53 minutes?
I watched The Lion King yesterday and the theme song keeps playing in my head
I'm getting stressed out
It keeps playing in my head
They're not chewy The large intestines are
I made this special sauce today (makjang)
It's just ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste) and cider
Every bite of the small intestine is refreshing
I'll eat the large intestines later
I have to cook the middle, not the sides

That way, the grease comes out and the outside doesn't get too chewy
That's just my assumption btw
Makchang first
This looks more appetizing than when it was stacked up, right?
So chewy
This one got hard
It's hard
Do you hear this? It's a rock
It got yummy
This is what I'm talking about
The large intestines are delicious
But it's very oily
[inaudible] What am I even saying?
Some are crispy and some are not
My cat is over here
Small intestines and makchang

Looks delicious
So good
Really good
Small and Large intestines
Pickled leek as well
I'm going to eat the large intestines later and eat the rest right now
The large intestines are really delicious at the restaurant
It just melts in my mouth The outside is very crispy and the inside is very soft
But sadly it's not like that right now
Tasty
Put the green onion kimchi on top,
Did you guys see the fat squirt out?
Dip it in the sauce
The combination with the green onion kimchi is insane
I like it I like it
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
